TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_adada_ku_tapeling, title = adada_ku_tapeling, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/adada_ku_tapeling} }

S.FORM: == adada ku tapelingśÖĘśÄßŤÉįŤÖļÁāé == adadaan nu tapeling u matenesay a adadaan a tapeling, matineng misumad tu lalabuay nu kapahay nu mikawaway. taneng ci nida misuayaw tu madukaay a tapelingan nu tada adadaay a tapelingan, atu matulinay a adadaan atu caayay ka ngaay nu nikadukaan. u imelang kauynian sa, u picidekan sa milaecus tu adada nu tapeling, mahiniay makalahay a adada nu tapeling a caay kaw mamadungdung. . wayway nu udip atu imilang ťęĒŚĺĶŚíĆÁóáÁčÄ adada ku pabawan nu bili: anu malipah tu atu namukan macunus ku adada, anu caay tu kan atu talaayaw ku eneng mawada ku adda sa. idaw ku caayay ka adada nu dumaan a tademaw. 35 simal a piyas: sawni muledung tu, masimal, angtul ku tai', tapeling anu madukatu mawada ku nika tahekalan a nikanan a yi-mei a nikapatahekal, sisa inai' ku iyu. u simal atu iyu caay ka ala tayda i udiudipan, mabulesak, sisimal ku tai', sisa u simal nu piyasan han. kanahantu matatungus ku nikanatu sausi, u ba'ket han mawada'tu. ŤĄāŤā™ÁÄČ:ť†ĽÁĻĀ,ś≤ĻŤÜ©, . cacay nu waywayan a siwanengay nu isi' a imelang: tapeling miladay tu yi-daw nikalekalan tu yi-daw-su sapalatahekal tu pu-taw-tan nikalecadan, sipakayda i sakacacay a waywayan nu siwanengay a isi'an. cacay nu wayway a siwanengay nu isi'an pasu hinangalay atu macunus ku hinangaluh, haliisi', mawada ku ba'ket atu hinangelu'. 1 . nina imelangÁóÖŚõ† adadaan nu tapeling a imelangan mahini sa: alukulu, caay ka kapah ku udip, ma'sut ku hikan, micidekay a adada nu tapeling, malebawa, caay ka taneng ku idang, malaba'tu. 30 hican mingaay ku adadaay nu tapelingan nika taisingan ku kapahay, pacumuda ku sasingki i bili mikinsa atu misizicu. i mahiniay sa, sipakayda i tada adadaay a mingaay, sapihamaw tu adada atu caay kakapah ku nihelupan. alaw a idaw ku tapeling nu miidaay a siwaneng nu isi'an, a matenes ku sapingaay tu mahinaay a imelangan. nika a dadaan nu bili hakiya pihaceng, a yadah ku nikan tu sakacaay ka adada nu sapayuan, alahica pasuya-pan a sapayuan. acaay tu kan tupah atu misumad tu kan mikelec tu adada atu mihamaw mabulasak a sakaetim nu cililan. Kan-yen-ha'-ci idaw ku niedapan, nika nai' henay ku wantan idaway hakiya ku imian sa. . yi-meiŤÉįťÖ∂ sapidayli tu yi-mei a imelingan kanca u mingaayay atu adada nu tapeling nu caayay ka kaapah nu nipicumuda nu yiyuan atu simal nu piyasan. adadaan nu tapeling a sapingaay pasukilul tu nika a pacumud tu yi-mei. idaw ku mahiniay a imelangan sipakayda i mei miwada tu adada. u sakakapahan ku mahiniay, sisa makayda tu katuuday a tademawan, sipakayni i adada nu tapelingan pacumud tu mei u kapahay ku mahiniay a sapingaay sa. nu inai'ay a tabakiay nu husuan a imelangay atu micidekay nu adadaan nu tapelingay a imelangay, u madayumay a mangaaay sa. 93 mingaay tu nikaadadaan nu tapeling a sizicuan kanca malatusa, cacay han hamin han miala atu idaw ku husu cacuhcuhan a patahekal. mipili' tu nisizicuan hakiay idaw ku pacebaay a lebawaan, mulecusay nu husuan, nikalebawa nu bili atu nikasu'tan i tida. tapeling nai' ku nikan sakalecad a sizicuan taneng sipakayda i mingaayay tu nika adadaan nu tapelingan. . liw-sin-adada a cudadśĶĀŤ°ĆÁóÖŚ≠ł mahiniay a imelangan tu mihmihcaan makaala tu cacay a bataan nu wan a tademawan lima-sabaw tu tusa a tademawan, ninaimelangan a tademaw cacay a bataan a wanngan lima a bataan ku tademaw. 2021 mhcaan , saan ci Wen-ciu-li, tapelaing taneng mihuchuc tu yadahay nu fan-se-sin-se' " se'-134 atu se' 137" sisa idaw ku adada nu tapeling atu gan nu tapelin, maduka ku tapeling atu siwanengay a isi'an nu tapeling.
S.PHON: == adada ku tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč***** == adadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč u mat…ôn…ôsaj a adadaan a tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč, matin…ôŇč misumad tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj nu kapańßaj nu mikawawaj. tan…ôŇč ¶i nida misuajaw tu madukaaj a tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan nu tada adadaaj a tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan, atu matur~…ĺinaj a adadaan atu ¶aajaj ka Ňčaaj nu nikadukaan. u im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kaujnian sa, u pi ¶id…ôkan sa mir~…ĺa…ô ¶us tu adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč, mańßiniaj makar~…ĺańßaj a adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč a ¶aaj kaw mamaduŇčduŇč. . wajwaj nu udip atu imir~…ĺaŇč ***** adada ku pabawan nu bir~…ĺi: anu mar~…ĺipańß tu atu namukan ma ¶unus ku adada, anu ¶aaj tu kan atu tar~…ĺaajaw ku …ôn…ôŇč mawada ku adda sa. idaw ku ¶aajaj ka adada nu dumaan a tad…ômaw. ** simar~…ĺ a pijas: sawni mur~…ĺ…ôduŇč tu, masimar~…ĺ, aŇčtur~…ĺ ku tai Ē~ °, tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč anu madukatu mawada ku nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan a nikanan a ji-m…ôi a nikapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ, sisa inai Ē~ ° ku iju. u simar~…ĺ atu iju ¶aaj ka ar~…ĺa tajda i udiudipan, mabur~…ĺ…ôsak, sisimar~…ĺ ku tai Ē~ °, sisa u simar~…ĺ nu pijasan ńßan. kanańßantu matatuŇčus ku nikanatu sausi, u ba Ē~ °k…ôt ńßan mawada Ē~ °tu. ***:**,**, . ¶a ¶aj nu wajwajan a siwan…ôŇčaj nu isi Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč: tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč mir~…ĺadaj tu ji-daw nikar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu ji-daw-su sapar~…ĺatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu pu-taw-tan nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan, sipakajda i saka ¶a ¶aj a wajwajan nu siwan…ôŇčaj a isi Ē~ °an. ¶a ¶aj nu wajwaj a siwan…ôŇčaj nu isi Ē~ °an pasu ńßinaŇčar~…ĺaj atu ma ¶unus ku ńßinaŇčar~…ĺuńß, ńßar~…ĺiisi Ē~ °, mawada ku ba Ē~ °k…ôt atu ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °. * . nina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč** adadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mańßini sa: ar~…ĺukur~…ĺu, ¶aaj ka kapańß ku udip, ma Ē~ °sut ku ńßikan, mi ¶id…ôkaj a adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč, mar~…ĺ…ôbawa, ¶aaj ka tan…ôŇč ku idaŇč, mar~…ĺaba Ē~ °tu. ** ńßi ¶an miŇčaaj ku adadaaj nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan nika taisiŇčan ku kapańßaj, pa ¶umuda ku sasiŇčki i bir~…ĺi mikinsa atu misizi ¶u. i mańßiniaj sa, sipakajda i tada adadaaj a miŇčaaj, sapińßamaw tu adada atu ¶aaj kakapańß ku nińß…ôr~…ĺupan. ar~…ĺaw a idaw ku tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč nu miidaaj a siwan…ôŇč nu isi Ē~ °an, a mat…ôn…ôs ku sapiŇčaaj tu mańßinaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. nika a dadaan nu bir~…ĺi ńßakija pińßa ¶…ôŇč, a jadańß ku nikan tu saka ¶aaj ka adada nu sapajuan, ar~…ĺańßi ¶a pasuja-pan a sapajuan. a ¶aaj tu kan tupańß atu misumad tu kan mik…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ tu adada atu mińßamaw mabur~…ĺasak a saka…ôtim nu ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺan. kan-j…ôn-ńßa Ē~ °- ¶i idaw ku ni…ôdapan, nika nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan idawaj ńßakija ku imian sa. . ji-m…ôi** sapidajr~…ĺi tu ji-m…ôi a im…ôr~…ĺiŇčan kan ¶a u miŇčaajaj atu adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč nu ¶aajaj ka kaapańß nu nipi ¶umuda nu jijuan atu simar~…ĺ nu pijasan. adadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč a sapiŇčaaj pasukir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nika a pa ¶umud tu ji-m…ôi. idaw ku mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan sipakajda i m…ôi miwada tu adada. u sakakapańßan ku mańßiniaj, sisa makajda tu katuudaj a tad…ômawan, sipakajni i adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan pa ¶umud tu m…ôi u kapańßaj ku mańßiniaj a sapiŇčaaj sa. nu inai Ē~ °aj a tabakiaj nu ńßusuan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj atu mi ¶id…ôkaj nu adadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, u madajumaj a maŇčaaaj sa. ** miŇčaaj tu nikaadadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč a sizi ¶uan kan ¶a mar~…ĺatusa, ¶a ¶aj ńßan ńßamin ńßan miar~…ĺa atu idaw ku ńßusu ¶a ¶uńß ¶uńßan a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ. mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nisizi ¶uan ńßakiaj idaw ku pa ¶…ôbaaj a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan, mur~…ĺ…ô ¶usaj nu ńßusuan, nikar~…ĺ…ôbawa nu bir~…ĺi atu nikasu Ē~ °tan i tida. tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč nai Ē~ ° ku nikan sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a sizi ¶uan tan…ôŇč sipakajda i miŇčaajaj tu nika adadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan. . r~…ĺiw-sin-adada a ¶udad**** mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan tu mińßmińß ¶aan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu wan a tad…ômawan r~…ĺima-sabaw tu tusa a tad…ômawan, ninaim…ôr~…ĺaŇčan a tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj a bataan a wanŇčan r~…ĺima a bataan ku tad…ômaw. **** mńß ¶aan , saan ¶i w…ôn- ¶iu-r~…ĺi, tap…ôr~…ĺaiŇč tan…ôŇč mińßu ¶ńßu ¶ tu jadańßaj nu fan-s…ô-sin-s…ô Ē~ ° " s…ô Ē~ °-*** atu s…ô Ē~ ° ***" sisa idaw ku adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč atu gan nu tap…ôr~…ĺin, maduka ku tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč atu siwan…ôŇčaj a isi Ē~ °an nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč.
S.FORM: == adada ku tapelingśÖĘśÄßŤÉįŤÖļÁāé == adadaan nu tapeling u matenesay a adadaan a tapeling, matineng misumad tu lalabuay nu kapahay nu mikawaway. taneng ci nida misuayaw tu madukaay a tapelingan nu tada adadaay a tapelingan, atu matulinay a adadaan atu caayay ka ngaay nu nikadukaan. u imelang kauynian sa, u picidekan sa milaecus tu adada nu tapeling, mahiniay makalahay a adada nu tapeling a caay kaw mamadungdung. . wayway nu udip atu imilang ťęĒŚĺĶŚíĆÁóáÁčÄ adada ku pabawan nu bili: anu malipah tu atu namukan macunus ku adada, anu caay tu kan atu talaayaw ku eneng mawada ku adda sa. idaw ku caayay ka adada nu dumaan a tademaw. 35 simal a piyas: sawni muledung tu, masimal, angtul ku tai', tapeling anu madukatu mawada ku nika tahekalan a nikanan a yi-mei a nikapatahekal, sisa inai' ku iyu. u simal atu iyu caay ka ala tayda i udiudipan, mabulesak, sisimal ku tai', sisa u simal nu piyasan han. kanahantu matatungus ku nikanatu sausi, u ba'ket han mawada'tu. ŤĄāŤā™ÁÄČ:ť†ĽÁĻĀ,ś≤ĻŤÜ©, . cacay nu waywayan a siwanengay nu isi' a imelang: tapeling miladay tu yi-daw nikalekalan tu yi-daw-su sapalatahekal tu pu-taw-tan nikalecadan, sipakayda i sakacacay a waywayan nu siwanengay a isi'an. cacay nu wayway a siwanengay nu isi'an pasu hinangalay atu macunus ku hinangaluh, haliisi', mawada ku ba'ket atu hinangelu'. 1 . nina imelangÁóÖŚõ† adadaan nu tapeling a imelangan mahini sa: alukulu, caay ka kapah ku udip, ma'sut ku hikan, micidekay a adada nu tapeling, malebawa, caay ka taneng ku idang, malaba'tu. 30 hican mingaay ku adadaay nu tapelingan nika taisingan ku kapahay, pacumuda ku sasingki i bili mikinsa atu misizicu. i mahiniay sa, sipakayda i tada adadaay a mingaay, sapihamaw tu adada atu caay kakapah ku nihelupan. alaw a idaw ku tapeling nu miidaay a siwaneng nu isi'an, a matenes ku sapingaay tu mahinaay a imelangan. nika a dadaan nu bili hakiya pihaceng, a yadah ku nikan tu sakacaay ka adada nu sapayuan, alahica pasuya-pan a sapayuan. acaay tu kan tupah atu misumad tu kan mikelec tu adada atu mihamaw mabulasak a sakaetim nu cililan. Kan-yen-ha'-ci idaw ku niedapan, nika nai' henay ku wantan idaway hakiya ku imian sa. . yi-meiŤÉįťÖ∂ sapidayli tu yi-mei a imelingan kanca u mingaayay atu adada nu tapeling nu caayay ka kaapah nu nipicumuda nu yiyuan atu simal nu piyasan. adadaan nu tapeling a sapingaay pasukilul tu nika a pacumud tu yi-mei. idaw ku mahiniay a imelangan sipakayda i mei miwada tu adada. u sakakapahan ku mahiniay, sisa makayda tu katuuday a tademawan, sipakayni i adada nu tapelingan pacumud tu mei u kapahay ku mahiniay a sapingaay sa. nu inai'ay a tabakiay nu husuan a imelangay atu micidekay nu adadaan nu tapelingay a imelangay, u madayumay a mangaaay sa. 93 mingaay tu nikaadadaan nu tapeling a sizicuan kanca malatusa, cacay han hamin han miala atu idaw ku husu cacuhcuhan a patahekal. mipili' tu nisizicuan hakiay idaw ku pacebaay a lebawaan, mulecusay nu husuan, nikalebawa nu bili atu nikasu'tan i tida. tapeling nai' ku nikan sakalecad a sizicuan taneng sipakayda i mingaayay tu nika adadaan nu tapelingan. . liw-sin-adada a cudadśĶĀŤ°ĆÁóÖŚ≠ł mahiniay a imelangan tu mihmihcaan makaala tu cacay a bataan nu wan a tademawan lima-sabaw tu tusa a tademawan, ninaimelangan a tademaw cacay a bataan a wanngan lima a bataan ku tademaw. 2021 mhcaan , saan ci Wen-ciu-li, tapelaing taneng mihuchuc tu yadahay nu fan-se-sin-se' " se'-134 atu se' 137" sisa idaw ku adada nu tapeling atu gan nu tapelin, maduka ku tapeling atu siwanengay a isi'an nu tapeling.

madukaaj a tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan nu tada adadaaj a tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan, atu matur~…ĺinaj a adadaan atu ¶aajaj ka Ňčaaj nu nikadukaan. u im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kaujnian sa, u pi ¶id…ôkan sa mir~…ĺa…ô ¶us tu adada nu a siwan…ôŇčaj nu isi Ē~ °an pasu ńßinaŇčar~…ĺaj atu ma ¶unus ku ńßinaŇčar~…ĺuńß, ńßar~…ĺiisi Ē~ °, mawada ku ba Ē~ °k…ôt atu ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °. * . nina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč** adadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mańßini sa: ar~…ĺukur~…ĺu, ¶aaj ka kapańß ku udip, ma Ē~ °sut ku ńßikan, mi ¶id…ôkaj a adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč, mar~…ĺ…ôbawa, ¶aaj ka tan…ôŇč ku idaŇč, mar~…ĺaba Ē~ °tu. ** ńßi ¶an miŇčaaj ku adadaaj nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan nika taisiŇčan ku kapańßaj, pa ¶umuda ku sasiŇčki i bir~…ĺi mikinsa atu misizi ¶u. i mańßiniaj sa, sipakajda i tada adadaaj a miŇčaaj, sapińßamaw tu adada atu ¶aaj kakapańß ku nińß…ôr~…ĺupan. ar~…ĺaw a idaw ku tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč nu miidaaj a siwan…ôŇč nu isi Ē~ °an, a mat…ôn…ôs ku sapiŇčaaj tu mańßinaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. nika a dadaan nu bir~…ĺi ńßakija pińßa ¶…ôŇč, a ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺan. kan-j…ôn-ńßa Ē~ °- ¶i idaw ku ni…ôdapan, nika nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan idawaj ńßakija ku imian sa. . ji-m…ôi** sapidajr~…ĺi tu ji-m…ôi a im…ôr~…ĺiŇčan kan ¶a u miŇčaajaj atu adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč nu ¶aajaj ka kaapańß nu nipi ¶umuda nu jijuan atu simar~…ĺ nu pijasan. adadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč a sapiŇčaaj pasukir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nika a pa ¶umud tu ji-m…ôi. idaw ku mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan sipakajda i m…ôi miwada tu adada. u sakakapańßan ku mańßiniaj, sisa makajda tu katuudaj a tad…ômawan, sipakajni i adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan pa ¶umud tu m…ôi u kapańßaj ku mańßiniaj a sapiŇčaaj sa. nu inai Ē~ °aj a tabakiaj nu ńßusuan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj atu mi ¶id…ôkaj nu adadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, u madajumaj a maŇčaaaj sa. ** miŇčaaj tu nikaadadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč a sizi ¶uan kan ¶a mar~…ĺatusa, ¶a ¶aj ńßan ńßamin ńßan miar~…ĺa atu idaw ku ńßusu ¶a ¶uńß ¶uńßan a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ. mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nisizi ¶uan ńßakiaj idaw ku pa ¶…ôbaaj a r~…ĺ…ôbawaan, mur~…ĺ…ô ¶usaj nu ńßusuan, nikar~…ĺ…ôbawa nu bir~…ĺi atu nikasu Ē~ °tan i tida. tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč nai Ē~ ° ku nikan sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a sizi ¶uan tan…ôŇč sipakajda i miŇčaajaj tu nika adadaan nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇčan. . r~…ĺiw-sin-adada a ¶udad**** mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan tu mińßmińß ¶aan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu wan a tad…ômawan r~…ĺima-sabaw tu tusa a tad…ômawan, ninaim…ôr~…ĺaŇčan a tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj a bataan a wanŇčan r~…ĺima a bataan ku tad…ômaw. **** mńß ¶aan , saan ¶i w…ôn- ¶iu-r~…ĺi, tap…ôr~…ĺaiŇč tan…ôŇč mińßu ¶ńßu ¶ tu jadańßaj nu fan-s…ô-sin-s…ô Ē~ ° " s…ô Ē~ °-*** atu s…ô Ē~ ° ***" sisa idaw ku adada nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč atu gan nu tap…ôr~…ĺin, maduka ku tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč atu siwan…ôŇčaj a isi Ē~ °an nu tap…ôr~…ĺiŇč.
